zh.lifeSummary: William Calthorpe是Oliver Calthorpe和Isabel Bacon的兒子，於1367年出生在英國諾福爾可伯納姆 索普。他於1388年與Eleanor Alianore Alinora de Mautby在英國英格蘭諾福爾可索普結婚。他去世於1420年12月29日在英國英格蘭諾福爾可伯納姆 索普享年53歲，埋葬在英國諾福爾可伯納姆 索普。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: William Calthorpe是Oliver Calthorpe和Isabel Bacon的儿子，于1367年出生在英国諾福爾可伯納姆 索普。他于1388年与Eleanor Alianore Alinora de Mautby在英国英格兰諾福爾可索普结婚。他去世于1420年12月29日在英国英格兰諾福爾可伯納姆 索普享年53岁，埋葬在英国諾福爾可伯納姆 索普。

nameMeanings.name: Calthorpe
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: William Calthorpe was born in 1367, in Burnham Thorpe, Norfolk, England as the son of Oliver Calthorpe and Isabel Bacon. He married Eleanor Alianore Alinora de Mautby in 1388, in Thorpe, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom. He died on 29 December 1420, in Burnham Thorpe, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 53, and was buried in Burnham Thorpe, Norfolk, England.

fr.lifeSummary: William Calthorpe est né en 1367, à Burnham Thorpe, Norfolk, Angleterre, fils de Oliver Calthorpe et Isabel Bacon. Il a épousé Eleanor Alianore Alinora de Mautby en 1388, à Thorpe, Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Il est décédé le 29 décembre 1420, à Burnham Thorpe, Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 53 ans, et a été enterré à Burnham Thorpe, Norfolk, Angleterre.

Er hat 1388 in Thorpe, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom Eleanor Alianore Alinora de Mautby geheiratet. Er starb am 29. Lui sposato Eleanor Alianore Alinora de Mautby nel 1388, nel Thorpe, Norfolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. ja.lifeSummary: William Calthorpeは1367年にイギリスノーフォルクブルンハム ソルペでOliver CalthorpeとIsabel Baconの息子として生まれた。1388年にイギリスイギリスノーフォルクソルペでEleanor Alianore Alinora de Mautbyと結婚した。彼は1420年12月29日にイギリスイギリスノーフォルクブルンハム ソルペで53歳で死去し，イギリスノーフォルクブルンハム ソルペにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: William Calthorpe(은)는 1367년 영국 노르폴크 번함 소에서 Oliver Calthorpe(와)과 Isabel Bacon의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 1388년 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 소에서 Eleanor Alianore Alinora de Mautby(와)과 결혼했다. 그는 1420년 12월 29일 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 번함 소에서 53세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 노르폴크 번함 소에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: William Calthorpe родился в 1367 г. в местности бурнам таурп, норфолк, Англия. Его родителей звали Oliver Calthorpe и Isabel Bacon. Он женился на женщине по имени Eleanor Alianore Alinora de Mautby в 1388 г. в местности таурп, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания. Он умер 29 декабря 1420 г. в местности бурнам таурп, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 53 лет и был похоронен в местности бурнам таурп, норфолк, Англия.
